reason: Browser-use feature successfully executed browser commands to open a browser, navigate to https://example.com, retrieve the page title "Example Domain", and close the browser.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with title "Gamut"
Found agent "QA-20260722-003604-htd0" in the sidebar and clicked it — Agent page loaded with chat interface
Clicked on message input field — Input field became active and ready for typing
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." and sent with cmd+enter — Message sent successfully
Agent executed browser tools including Open Browser, Get State, and Close Browser — All tools completed with green checkmarks
Waited for response from agent — Response received within 15 seconds
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" and took screenshot — Response clearly states "The page title is 'Example Domain'" and "Its title/heading is 'Example Domain'"
